heading: State plans
label: 49g State plans
text: Any State desiring to receive assistance under shall prepare and submit to, and have approved by, the Secretary and the Secretary of Education, a State plan in accordance with section 3112 or 3113 of this title.section 49e of this title
notes: Amendments2014— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of subsecs. (a) to (d) relating to submission, required content, and approval of State plans.Pub. L. 113–1281998—Subsec. (a). , amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “Any State desiring to receive the benefits of this chapter shall, by the agency designated to cooperate with the United States Employment Service, submit to the Secretary of Labor detailed plans for carrying out the provisions of this chapter within such State.”Pub. L. 105–220, § 306(1)Subsec. (b). , (3), redesignated subsec. (d) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b) which contained certain requirements for plan preparation at State and national levels.Pub. L. 105–220, § 306(2)Subsec. (c). , (4), added subsec. (c) and struck out former subsec. (c) which read as follows: “The Governor of the State shall be afforded the opportunity to review and transmit to the Secretary proposed modifications of such plans submitted.”Pub. L. 105–220, § 306(2)Subsec. (d). , (6), redesignated subsec. (e) as (d) and substituted “such detailed plans” for “such plans”. Former subsec. (d) redesignated (b).Pub. L. 105–220, § 306(5)Subsec. (e). , redesignated subsec. (e) as (d).Pub. L. 105–220, § 306(5)1982—, substituted “Secretary of Labor” for “Director” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 97–300, § 601(d)(1)Subsec. (a). , designated provisions relating to the submission of a plan to the Secretary by any State desiring to receive benefits under certain sections of this chapter as subsec. (a).Pub. L. 97–300, § 601(d)(2)Subsecs. (b), (c). , added subsecs. (b) and (c).Pub. L. 97–300, § 601(d)(5)Subsec. (d). , designated provisions relating to the inclusion in State plans of provision for handicapped persons employment opportunities and coordination with State agencies similarly concerned as subsec. (d).Pub. L. 97–300, § 601(d)(3)Subsec. (e). , designated provisions relating to approval and notice by the Secretary of the State plans as subsec. (e).Pub. L. 97–300, § 601(d)(4)1954—Act , inserted provisions relating to promotion and development of employment opportunities and for job counseling and placement of handicapped persons.Aug. 3, 1954

Effective Date of 2014 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 113–128section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this titleJuly 22, 2014July 1, 2015
Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , formerly set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–220section 311 of Pub. L. 105–220section 49a of this titleJuly 1, 1999

Effective Date of 1982 AmendmentAmendment by effective , but with Secretary authorized to use funds appropriated for fiscal 1983 to plan for orderly implementation of amendment, see , which was formerly classified to .Pub. L. 97–300section 181(i) of Pub. L. 97–300section 1591(i) of this titleOct. 1, 1983
Effective Date of 1954 AmendmentAmendment by act , effective , see section 8 of act , set out as a note under .Aug. 3, 1954July 1, 1954Aug. 3, 1954section 49b of this title
